title: McCarthy Tétrault Recognized in Lexpert’s 2024 Litigation Special Edition and Top 10 Business Decisions
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Recognized in Lexpert’s 2024 Litigation Special Edition and Top 10 Business Decisions
We have been lauded by Lexpert for the firm’s outstanding litigation and dispute resolution expertise. The 2024 Lexpert Special Edition: Litigation publication named 51 of the firm’s Lexpert-ranked lawyers as leading litigators. Additionally, the firm represented clients in two cases listed among the Top 10 Business Decisions of 2023-2024 :
- Yatar v. TD Insurance Meloche Monnex , 2024 SCC 8 – A case confirming that a statutory right of appeal does not prevent a person from seeking judicial review. McCarthy Tétrault represented TD Insurance Meloche Monnex with a team that included Christine Lonsdale , Adam Goldenberg and Erin Chesney .
- Canada (Privacy Commissioner) v. Facebook, Inc . , 2024 FCA 140 : A case concerning a high-stakes application brought by the Privacy Commissioner of Canada challenging Meta’s compliance with the federal Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (“PIPEDA”). McCarthy Tétrault represented Facebook, Inc. (now Meta Platforms Inc.) with a team that included Michael Feder, K.C. , Gillian Kerr , Barry Sookman , Daniel Glover and Connor Bildfell . The case is now the subject of a leave application to the Supreme Court of Canada.
Each year, Lexpert’s Top 10 Business Decisions highlights impactful judicial rulings affecting the Canadian business community. In this feature, Christine Lonsdale commented on the significance of the Yatar v. TD Insurance Meloche Monnex decision.
The Lexpert Special Edition: Litigation also includes insights on emerging trends in business litigation and dispute resolution. Moya Graham discussed the latest development in commercial litigation and Junior Sirivar explored the trends he’s seeing in the alternative dispute resolution.
The following McCarthy Tétrault lawyers have been recognized as leading litigators in the special edition:
- Dominic Bédard-Lapointe
- Douglas T. Yoshida, K.C.
- Julie-Martine Loranger
- Michael A. Feder , K.C.
- Timothy St. J. Ellam, K.C.
Lexpert’s Top 10 Business Decisions is an eagerly awaited annual list that highlights the most significant court rulings in Canada. Lexpert Special Edition: Litigation showcases top-ranked litigation lawyers and their exceptional efforts in defending client interests.
McCarthy Tétrault's Litigation & Dispute Resolution Group gets to the heart of the real business issues, manages matters with objectivity and clarity, and buffers your company against disruption. We seek satisfactory resolution or a successful outcome in court. Major businesses count on McCarthy Tétrault when they confront complex disputes, whether in Canada or internationally. Through our offices across Canada, we provide all the resources needed to handle complex and multijurisdictional disputes in either official language. Learn how our team can help you .
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
